items.summary: Add a modern sans-serif web font for the app and apply it globally so all text uses the new font consistently across Login, Calendar, Daily, and Settings views.

Increase overall text brightness/legibility by adjusting the global color tokens used for text (foreground, muted-foreground, and card-foreground) and ensuring readable contrast on glassmorphism cards and over background images in both light and dark themes.
Improve perceived text clarity by adding global typographic rendering enhancements (e.g., font smoothing and consistent letter rendering) without changing any existing app behavior or animations.
